subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! This Wronged One hath made mention of thee, and continueth to make mention of thee, in the Most Great Scene. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر این مظلوم در منظر اکبر ترا ذکر نموده و مینماید از حق میطلبیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
